Vibration Controller & Test Development
VR9700 Vibration Testing Controller
Founded in 1995, Vibration Research is where reliable products meet innovative solutions. VR designs and builds advanced vibration control systems, compatible with any brand of electrodynamic or servo-hydraulic shakers, as well as portable systems for dynamic signal analysis.
The VR9700 Vibration Testing Controller
Vibration Research’s user-friendly software delivers trustworthy results for vibration control and data analysis. Customers worldwide, including leading aerospace, automotive, and electronics companies, rely on VR for unmatched performance and expert support.
Explore Products
Our Products
Vibration Controller
Shaker Systems
Portable DAQ & Analyzer
Test Profile Development
Download Free Software Demo
SUPPORT &
SERVICE
Providing customers with high-quality support contributes significantly to their long-term success with us. Keeping your system running smoothly and getting questions answered in a timely manner is important to the success of your business, as well as ours.
Learn More
DARE TO
COMPARE
Are you skeptical about VR meeting your standards? Is your current controller out for calibration, not working, or unable to perform a test? Put us to the test. Whether it is a brand-new system or a replacement controller, we will let you try our fully-enabled hardware and software for 30 days. Once you use it, we think you will be hooked.
Take Control
INNOVATION
NEVER STOPS
Vibration Research is the leader in vibration control. Our advantage is clear: Innovation. VR’s proprietary control software features include Field Data Replication, Fatigue Damage Spectrum, Kurtosion®, Instant Degrees of Freedom®, TruClip™, and TruDAC.

about.text:
About - Vibration Research
About
Vibration Research designs and manufactures vibration control systems and data acquisition systems for vibration testing on electrodynamic and servo-hydraulic shakers. Since 1995, VR has become a pioneer in the industry and the leader in vibration control and data acquisition. Advanced hardware capabilities and software support combined with powerful, user-friendly software make Vibration Research controllers the premier choice of testing labs around the globe.
Product Catalog
MISSION
To provide superior, easy-to-use test technology, expert customer support, and innovation to meet the needs of today & drive industries to the possibilities of tomorrow.
TAGLINE
At Vibration Research, we know what’s at stake when our customers run a test. Whether they’re simulating the launch of a satellite or ensuring the safety of a critical component, failure is not an option. Every test must be precise. Every result must be trusted. Every product must perform.
That’s why we chose
“RELIABILITY MEETS INNOVATION.”
This is more than a tagline, it is the promise we have built our company around for 30 years. Our customers depend on our systems every day, and they choose us because of what we build, and because of how we support them.
VISION
To make the world’s most innovative vibration testing technologies, enabling our customers to make reliable decisions and trustworthy products.
INNOVATION
that pushes the boundaries of what is possible in vibration testing, with cutting-edge control algorithms, intuitive software, and forward-thinking solutions.
RELIABILITY
that gives customers peace of mind, the confidence to test without worry, knowing that we are behind them every step of the way with rock-solid products and unmatched support.
“RELIABILITY MEETS INNOVATION”
is where modern technology and dependable engineering come together. It is where our customers find not just a product, but a partner. Because at the end of the day, we don’t just deliver test systems, we deliver trust.
MEET OUR TEAM
John Van Baren
President/CEO
Armed with 15 years of shaker, amplifier & controller engineering and a degree from the University of Michigan, John saw an opportunity to start something new and innovative. He used his experience and skills to create revolutionary control systems and began Vibration Research. Since he founded VR, John has stressed the importance of reliable, easy-to-use control systems and continuous development of leading-edge hardware and software.
Philip Van Baren
SENIOR VICE PRESIDENT PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT
While working on his Ph.D. in Control Theory at the University of Michigan, Phil joined Vibration Research in 1998 and immediately began developing software for the very first controller system. Phil is the chief author of VR control software, holds the patent on kurtosis-controlled random testing, and heads the software development team at Vibration Research.

products.text:
Products - Vibration Research
Products
Proven Reliable Hardware, User-Friendly Software, Constant Innovation, Knowledgeable Support
Controller Software & Hardware
Vibration Controllers
Set up and safely control vibration shaker tests using any VR hardware unit and generate custom reports. Configure the VibrationVIEW control software for as many or as few test modules as you’d like (à la carte). Pick your control hardware based on specific needs.
Learn More
VibrationVIEW Catalog
Sine
Random
Shock
Shock Response Spectrum (SRS)
Sine Resonance Track & Dwell (SRTD)
Fatigue Damage Spectrum
View All Software Modules
Electrodynamic
Shaker Systems
Small force vibration testing equipment and shakers for product and modal analysis testing. Each system consists of a shaker and a matching linear direct-coupled power amplifier. Additional components may be added to the basic system to tailor it to your specific needs.
Learn More
Portable DAQ & Signal Analyzer
ObserVR1000
Collect data with the press of a button using the battery-powered ObserVR1000 hardware and a mobile interface. Stream to the SD card or PC while running other test modes, or use it independently as a field data recorder and analysis package.
Learn More
Data Sheet
Vibration Test Development Software
ObserVIEW
View, edit, and analyze waveforms from recorded or live data. This powerful and efficient vibration analysis software includes specialized modules for waveform recording and test profile development.
Learn More
ObserVIEW Catalog
Live Analyzer
Multimedia Sync
Advanced Analysis
Order Analysis
STAG

Contact
Contact us with any questions you may have. We will be in touch as quickly as we can. All information is kept strictly confidential.
At Vibration Research, we believe ongoing support is just as important as the initial installation. Please do not hesitate to get in touch!
